title: Better Enchantment+
description: Improves enchantment tooltips with clear descriptions and compatibility details.
body:
_A vanilla-friendly quality-of-life mod that makes enchantments easier to understand — without changing gameplay._

**Features**

- Adds clear descriptions under enchantments (when available)
  
- Shows conflicts and applicable item types on enchanted books (hold Shift)
  
- Works with all languages and modded enchantments

- No enchantment logic changes — 100% vanilla safe

**Perfect for players who want clarity, not spoilers.**



Todo
- More languages
- add level 1 Enchanting Table Tooltip
- add ways for custom enchantment to be added
- fix "Applies to"
